items.title: AMD’s new Ryzen 7 7700X3D plummets to $279 days after launch — the X3D chip rules the mid-range at its discounted price
items.summary: The Ryzen 7 7700X3D has suddenly become a solid value thanks to a $50 promo code, knocking its price down from $329 to just $279 on Newegg.
items.title_original: AMD’s new Ryzen 7 7700X3D plummets to $279 days after launch — the X3D chip rules the mid-range at its discounted price
items.title_en: AMD’s new Ryzen 7 7700X3D plummets to $279 days after launch — the X3D chip rules the mid-range at its discounted price
items.title_zh: AMD 新款 Ryzen 7 7700X3D 上市几天后暴跌至 279 美元——X3D 芯片以折扣价统治中端市场
items.title_bilingual: AMD 新款 Ryzen 7 7700X3D 上市几天后暴跌至 279 美元——X3D 芯片以折扣价统治中端市场 / AMD’s new Ryzen 7 7700X3D plummets to $279 days after launch — the X3D chip rules the mid-range at its discounted price
items.summary_zh: 由于 50 美元的促销代码，Ryzen 7 7700X3D 突然变得物有所值，将其在 Newegg 上的价格从 329 美元降至 279 美元。

items.title: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop — modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
items.summary: TrashBench recently decided to test whether adding more and more fans to a powerful GPU would improve its performance.
items.title_original: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop — modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
items.title_en: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop — modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
items.title_bilingual: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop — modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
items.summary_zh: TrashBench 最近决定测试为强大的 GPU 添加越来越多的风扇是否会提高其性能。

items.title: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle
items.summary: Newegg has a great combo bundle on sale with over $100 in savings for the fastest DDR4 gaming system you can build today. It pairs a Ryzen 7 5800X3D with 16GB of CL16 DDR4-3200 RAM and an Asus TUF Gaming B550-Plus WiFi II motherboard.
items.title_original: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle
items.title_en: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle
items.title_bilingual: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle
items.summary_zh: Newegg 提供超值组合捆绑销售，可节省 100 多美元，打造您今天可以构建的最快 DDR4 游戏系统。它搭配 Ryzen 7 5800X3D 和 16GB CL16 DDR4-3200 RAM 以及 Asus TUF Gaming B550-Plus WiFi II 主板。

items.title: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items.summary: The 3GB GDDR7 chips that the RTX 50 Super GPUs will use reportedly cost twice to thrice as much as the 2GB chips found on vanilla RTX 50-series graphics cards. This would likely push the retail price of these GPUs way beyond Nvidia's target MSRP.
items.title_original: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items.title_en: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items.title_bilingual: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items.summary_zh: 据报道，RTX 50 Super GPU 将使用的 3GB GDDR7 芯片的成本是普通 RTX 50 系列显卡上的 2GB 芯片的两倍到三倍。这可能会使这些 GPU 的零售价格远远超出 Nvidia 的目标建议零售价。

items.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items.summary: ‘The Jensen Jacket’ achieved a hammer price of $960,000 this weekend.

items.title_bilingual: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items.summary_zh: “Jensen 夹克”本周末的成交价为 96 万美元。

items.title: Security engineer ports password cracker hashcat to Gameboy Advance — 16.8 MHz chip can perform a meager 727 hashes a second, 30 million times slower than a modern rig
items.summary: Gameboy Advance port of hashcat allows for advanced password cracking in meager hardware — so long as you're willing to wait

items.title: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items.summary: The AGI AI828 is a budget drive with subpar performance and power efficiency. This makes it a last resort, although in the current market, it might be good enough for some.
items.title_original: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items.title_en: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items.title_zh: AGI AI828 SSD评测：预算有限的人的最后选择

items.summary_zh: AGI AI828 是一款性能和能效均低于标准的预算驱动器。这使得它成为最后的手段，尽管在当前市场上，它对于某些人来说可能已经足够好了。
